subcodes.first_line: O Emigrant, and son of the emigrant! Ye are they who have forsaken your homeland for the sake of God, the Lord of the hidden and the manifest. He doth bear witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهاجر و ابن مهاجر انتم الذین ترکتم الوطن لله مولی السر و العلن انه یشهد
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
